faq.subtitle: Questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before automating your blog.

list.question: Does Google penalize AI-generated content?
list.answer: Absolutely not. Google has officially stated that it focuses on the quality of content, not how it was produced. WP Content AI generates content structured for humans, ensuring real value to your readers.

list.question: Do I need an OpenAI API key?
list.answer: Yes, you will need your own API key for processing costs. However, WP Content AI is extremely efficient, operating at minimal costs — approximately $0.01 per long article. You can also use Gemini or Claude as alternatives.

list.question: Does it work with any WordPress theme?
list.answer: Yes! The plugin has been tested with all major themes (Elementor, Astra, GeneratePress, Divi, Kadence) and follows native WordPress standards, ensuring full compatibility regardless of your theme.

list.question: Can the plugin write in English?
list.answer: Yes, WP Content AI supports over 25 languages with grammatical perfection, including English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, and many more.

list.question: Is the plugin compatible with Rank Math and Yoast SEO?
list.answer: Yes! WP Content AI has native integration with Rank Math SEO and Yoast SEO. It automatically fills in the SEO title, meta description, primary keyword, and robots meta settings to ensure maximum performance across platforms.

list.question: Can I use it on WordPress Multisite?
list.answer: Yes, the lifetime license allows installation on unlimited sites, including WordPress Multisite networks. Each subsite can have its own independent feed configuration, API, and writing personality.

list.question: Are future updates included?
list.answer: Yes! By purchasing the lifetime license, you receive all future plugin updates for free, forever. New features, integration with new AI models, and performance improvements are delivered automatically.

list.question: Is it possible to customize the style and tone of the articles?
list.answer: Totally. You can create multiple 'Personas' with different tones of voice (formal, casual, journalistic, technical) and customize prompts for each feed separately. The plugin also features a text humanizer to ensure natural, fluid reading.

footer.brandDescription: Leading the artificial intelligence revolution applied to WordPress. Created for professionals who take SEO and content seriously.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using the WP Content AI plugin, you agree to fulfill and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you should not use our product.

sections.title: 2. License of Use
sections.content: The acquired license allows you to install and use the plugin on your sites. The lifetime license is personal and non-transferable, unless explicitly authorized.

sections.title: 3. Responsible AI Use
sections.content: The user is fully responsible for the content generated through the plugin. Even though we use cutting-edge APIs (GPT-4, Claude), we do not guarantee absolute accuracy of all text generated without human review.

sections.title: 4. Updates and Support
sections.content: We guarantee continuous updates to maintain compatibility with the latest WordPress versions. Support is offered according to the purchased plan.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is our priority
privacy.description: WP Content AI takes your data security seriously. This policy describes how we handle information collected during the use of our plugin and site.

sections.title: 1. API Keys
sections.content: Your OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google API keys are stored locally in YOUR WordPress database. We NEVER have access to your keys or the content generated by them.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
sections.content: We only collect basic information for license validation and anonymous usage statistics for product improvement. We do not sell your data to third parties.

sections.title: 3. Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies only to ensure website functionality and analyze traffic in aggregation.

licensing.title: Licensing
licensing.subtitle: Lifetime License Details
licensing.description: WP Content AI operates under a proprietary software licensing model focused on the content creator's freedom.

sections.title: 1. Unlimited Sites
sections.content: Your license allows usage on any site you own or manage for clients, with no additional costs per domain.

sections.title: 2. Code and Modifications
sections.content: The plugin code is accessible. You may make modifications for your own use, but redistribution or selling of derivative versions is not allowed.

sections.title: 3. Copyright
sections.content: The WP Content AI software is protected by copyright laws. The brand and logo are the exclusive property of Acelino Fernandes.
